title: Coconut Citrus Crumble Cookies
description: A twist on traditional cookies, these coconut citrus crumble cookies combine the crunch of cookies with the brightness of citrus and the richness of coconut.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together sugar and eggs.
Add in citrus zest and whisk until combined.
Stir in crushed cookies and shredded coconut.
Drop by spoonfuls onto a baking sheet.
Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until lightly golden.
Remove from oven and let cool on a wire rack.
Melt coconut oil in a small saucepan over low heat.
Pour melted coconut oil over cookies and serve.
